📌 Request: ' + _requestName + '
📌 URL: ' + pm.request.url + '
📌 Status: HTTP ' + pm.response.code + '

❌ Tests Failed (' + _failCount + '):
' + _failDetails.join('
') + '

📋 Response:
' + pm.response.text().substring(0, 500);

body: { mode: 'raw', raw: JSON.stringify({ fields: { project: { key: _projectKey }, summary: '[AUTO-BUG] ' + _requestName + ' - ' + _failCount + ' test(s) failed', issuetype: { name: 'Bug' }, priority: { name: 'High' }, description: { type: 'doc', version: 1, content: [{ type: 'paragraph', content: [{ type: 'text', text: desc }] }] } } }) }
if (err) { console.error('❌ Jira error:', err); return; }
var b = res.json(); b.key ? console.log('✅ Jira Bug:', b.key) : console.error('❌ Jira failed:', JSON.stringify(b));
